message:
fix(fj-conformance): correct axis param name in sort oracle

Use "axis" (fj-lax convention) instead of "dimension" (JAX convention).
Multi-axis sorting already works correctly.

Closes: frankenjax-sort-axis (not a bug, test used wrong param name)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
